summary: Phase 1 Feature Testing Complete - All Phase 1 features verified working: Status color reactive updates (bug fix confirmed), Search highlight with ring-primary and <mark> tag, New column types (Checkbox, Estado with colors, Formula), QTY footer totals, Column management (hide/show, delete custom columns, draggable reorder). Backend 12/12 tests passed, Frontend all features working.

issues: React hydration warnings persist (span inside tr/tbody/th) - cosmetic only, known from previous iterations

passed_tests: BACKEND: GET /api/config/options returns dropdown options
BACKEND: GET /api/orders returns orders with quantity field
BACKEND: GET /api/orders?board=SCHEDULING filters by board
BACKEND: GET /api/orders?search=xxx search functionality works
BACKEND: POST /api/orders creates order, PUT updates it, DELETE removes it
BACKEND: Order quantity field available for QTY footer totals
BACKEND: GET /api/automations returns automations
BACKEND: GET /api/activity returns activity logs
BACKEND: GET /api/orders/{id}/comments returns comments
BACKEND: custom_fields storage works for checkbox/formula values
BACKEND: Orders can be moved between boards
BACKEND: All board filtering works correctly
FRONTEND: Search highlight - row gets ring-2 ring-primary ring-inset bg-primary/10 class
FRONTEND: Search highlight - order_number wrapped in <mark> tag with yellow background
FRONTEND: AddColumnModal offers 'Checkbox' type
FRONTEND: AddColumnModal offers 'Estado (desplegable con colores)' with color picker
FRONTEND: AddColumnModal offers 'Fórmula / Condición' with formula input
FRONTEND: Checkbox column renders input[type=checkbox] in cells
FRONTEND: Formula column shows calculated value (quantity * 2 = 200 for 100 qty)
FRONTEND: Estado column with custom color options can be created
FRONTEND: QTY footer shows totals with data-testid='footer-total-{col.key}'
FRONTEND: Column manager panel opens via settings icon (data-testid='column-manager-panel')
FRONTEND: Each column shows Eye/EyeOff icon to toggle visibility
FRONTEND: Custom columns show X button to delete
FRONTEND: Table headers have draggable='true' attribute (20 draggable headers found)
FRONTEND: Column hide/show works (20→19 columns when hiding)
FRONTEND: visibleColumns excludes hidden columns for current board
FRONTEND: EditableCell useEffect syncs editValue when value prop changes (bug fix)
critical_code_review_comments: EditableCell useEffect at line 264-266 correctly syncs editValue when value prop changes - bug fix for status colors verified
evaluateFormula function (line 220-256) safely evaluates formulas using Function() with sanitization
AddColumnModal (line 809-921) correctly implements 7 column types including checkbox, estado, formula
visibleColumns computed property (line 1564-1575) respects hiddenColumns and boardColumnOrders per board
tfoot (line 2275-2303) correctly shows totals for numeric and formula columns
Column manager panel (line 2092-2116) shows Eye/EyeOff toggle and X delete for custom columns
Table headers (line 2184-2219) have draggable attribute and drag handlers for reordering
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create and cleanup test orders during execution (TEST_PHASE1_*, TEST_CUSTOM_*, TEST_MOVE_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 1 features all verified working: 1) Bug fix for status color updates confirmed - EditableCell has useEffect to sync editValue when value prop changes. 2) Search highlight works with ring-primary class and <mark> tag. 3) New column types: Checkbox (renders input[type=checkbox]), Estado (dropdown with custom colors), Formula (evaluates expressions like quantity * 2). 4) QTY footer totals show in tfoot with data-testid='footer-total-{key}'. 5) Column management: hide/show via Eye/EyeOff icon, delete custom columns via X button, drag-and-drop reorder via draggable headers. All features are per-board (hiddenColumns and boardColumnOrders state). Custom columns created during tests: TestFormula, TestCheckbox, TestEstado.

bug_fix_status_colors.implementation: useEffect syncs editValue when value prop changes

new_column_types.estado: Dropdown with color picker for options, stored as statusOptions

qty_footer.implementation: tfoot with sticky bottom-0, calculates sum for numeric/formula columns

column_management.delete_custom: X button for columns with custom=true
column_management.per_board: hiddenColumns and boardColumnOrders state objects keyed by board name

mocked_apis.email: Resend email still MOCKED (no API key configured)
mocked_apis.slack: Slack webhook still MOCKED (no URL configured)
